requiredTestNames: G24 rejects text overlap even when a generic waiver is present
G25 rejects shortened headlines and accepts active center and two-thirds boundaries
G26 rejects a title backing that is one pixel too short
G27 rejects missing, unsequenced, and merged-away topic coverage
G28 strips inherited empty paragraphs before fitting and rejects reinsertion
G28 source-template controls reject stale, collateral, destructive, and reinserted-bullet changes
missing font fails visibly and offers an explicit installed fallback
delivery manifest rejects missing, empty, corrupt, and non-PPTX outputs
